_comment: Vesting config for BooztoryToken (BOOZ) treasury allocations.
_notes: boozAmount: human-readable BOOZ (no decimals) — script applies 1e18 internally.
cliffDays: days from deploy before ANY tokens unlock.
linearDays: days of linear vesting AFTER the cliff. Set 0 for full unlock at cliff.
Team (1yr cliff, full unlock): cliffDays=365, linearDays=0
Total boozAmount across all entries must not exceed remaining TREASURY_CAP (10,000,000 BOOZ).
